_description: Functional test whitelist for run_checks.py. Tolerates known per-lane score mismatches caused by the XOR anti-merge lane-isolation transform (Phase H/I behaviour).

_schema.configs.<name>.min_lanes_match_lane0: minimum lanes (out of 15) whose mac_qk.accum must match the lane0 XOR-anti-merge expected value
_schema.configs.<name>.tolerated_mismatches: list of {check, max_count} entries permitting a bounded number of score mismatches per named check category

tolerated_mismatches.note: Pre-existing single-score-lane mismatch on NL-DPE DIMM top; orthogonal to the AH-track AL attn-head bug fixes.
